title: The Purloined Page
shortStory: A rare page was torn from a locked book in the library.

locations.name: Reading Room
locations.teaserText: Books are scattered across the floor.

actions.label: Check the floor
actions.description: Look for dropped items near the shelves.
actions.observationText: Books were disturbed {movementWord} from their shelves.

actions.label: Search the armchairs
actions.observationText: The armchairs are rumpled, but nothing is hidden here.

actions.label: Interview the librarian
actions.description: Ask what they heard last night.
actions.observationText: The librarian overheard soft footsteps after hours.

actions.label: Measure the marks
actions.description: Check the scuff marks on the counter.
actions.observationText: The scuffs are even and mid-height across the counter.

sizeOverrides.small: Small scuff marks sit low on the desk front.
sizeOverrides.large: Deep scuff marks line the top of the counter.

actions.label: Follow the traces
actions.observationText: A thin line of {textureWord} trails away from the desk.

actions.label: Photograph the desk
actions.description: Capture the surface before it is cleaned.
actions.observationText: The photo shows nothing beyond what you already saw.

locations.name: Rare Books
locations.teaserText: The restricted section has been disturbed.

actions.label: Check the bookcase base
actions.description: Inspect the floor under the shelves.
actions.observationText: The {groundWord} near the bookcase has been disturbed.

actions.label: Search the high shelves
actions.observationText: The high shelves are dusty but undisturbed.

actions.label: Listen for sounds
actions.observationText: The library is silent. No one is hiding here.

locations.name: Study Nook
locations.teaserText: The display case latch looks damaged.

actions.label: Inspect the display case
actions.description: Check where the latch was forced.
actions.observationText: Fresh scoring marks scratch the glass case latch.

actions.label: Check the inkwell
actions.observationText: It smells only of old paper and dust. Nothing stands out.

actions.label: Check the desk
actions.observationText: Whoever took the book left traces {movementWord} along the desk.

locations.name: Staff Office
locations.teaserText: A staff member remembers something odd.

actions.label: Talk to the assistant
actions.observationText: The assistant is certain about that detail.

actions.label: Check the coat rack
actions.description: Inspect the floor by the rack.
actions.observationText: Even by the door, a line of {textureWord} stayed behind.

actions.label: Search the staff cot
actions.observationText: The cot is undisturbed and holds no clues.

cookie-crumbs.title: Scattered Pages
cookie-crumbs.clueText: Torn pages were scattered {movementWord} near the shelf.

low-crumbs.title: Paper Fragments
low-crumbs.clueText: Paper fragments fell {movementWord} beside the desk.

quiet-digging.title: Quiet Rustling
quiet-digging.clueText: Someone heard soft rustling after closing hours.

small-tracks.title: Small Impressions
small-tracks.clueText: Small impressions dented the library carpet {movementWord}.

sand-trail.title: Dust Trail
sand-trail.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} led between the shelves.

loose-soil.title: Binding Dust
loose-soil.clueText: Fine dust from the binding settled {movementWord} under the shelf.

scratch-marks.title: Score Marks
scratch-marks.clueText: Fine score marks circled the display case lock.

dry-trail.title: Dry Trace
dry-trail.clueText: A line of {textureWord} led away from the reading nook.

ash-scatter.title: Debris
ash-scatter.clueText: A fine dusting of {textureWord} settled near the reference desk.

frost-trail.clueText: A trail of {textureWord} glistened down the aisle.

pollen-scent.clueText: The air carried a strange hint of {textureWord} from the old paper.

slime-trail.clueText: A slick ribbon of {textureWord} traced across the reading room floor.

static-mark.clueText: A faint scorch mark blackened the edge of the bookcase.

metal-shaving.clueText: Thin curls of metal were found near the display lock.

feather-drift.clueText: A few specks of {textureWord} drifted down near the stacks.
